Rythmos® Access + Wander Reader

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Access events
Wander events
Door state
Proximity detection

Overview

Rythmos® Access + Wander Reader is a wired access control and wander management reader designed for staff/resident access.

FUNCTIONS

Controls door access via maglocks and strikes
Enables proximity detection via Rythmos® wearables
Triggers wander and door-related events

Key Capabilities

Wander
Proximity

Resident
detection near exit

Door
Open Wander

Resident
detection near opened door

Loitering
detection

Extended
presence near door

Audible
Alert

Optional
onboard buzzer or external sounder

Door
Open/Closed

State
change event

Door
Forced

Unauthorized
opening

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 4.5 × 4.5 in (W × H)
Input Voltage: 12-24V DC / 1A
Current Draw: 50 mA (idle)
Relay Rating: 24V / 5A DC - 250V / 5A AC
Reader Interface: Rythmos Mesh Network
NFC: MIFARE Classic
Whitelist Capacity: Up to 900 fobs / wearables
Wearable Range: 1-30 ft (adjustable)
Installation: Indoor & outdoor · IP67 rated
Certifications: FCC · CSA · UL
Firmware Updates: OTA (over-the-air)

System Topology — Access + Wander Reader Deployment

Access + Wander Readers should be installed at exit doors, entry points, and transitions between monitored zones to support effective wander management and access control. Devices must be positioned to ensure reliable detection of wearables within the intended coverage area.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Install at door access points
- Indoor & outdoor (IP67)

Door Contact

- Use NC contact for door state
- Connect only to primary reader

Multi-Reader

- Use DualIn / DualOut
- Only primary reader controls lock

Power

- 12–24V DC (min 1A)
- PSU must support lock load

Access Inputs

- Keypad, button, or motion sensor
- Must use NO dry contact

Environment

- IP67 rated
- Use enclosure if exposed

intrexis.com
